blocked_boundaries: Cross-language materialize of any @boundary whose signature uses this primitive.
metadata.mint_path: Mint c11:String sort as char-pointer-with-length-tuple + sort-morphism:c11:string:to:concept:String with loss dimensions: encoding-undeclared, length-via-strlen-O(n), no-immutability-guarantee. Runtime guards: utf8-validity-check.
metadata.note: C has no native String value-type — only `const char*` with manual length tracking. UTF-8 is convention not type.
